# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-job CI/CD Workflow
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Set up QEMU
        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v1

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1

      - name: Cache Docker layers
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: /tmp/.buildx-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-

      - name: Login to DockerHub
        uses: docker/login-action@v1 
        with: 
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }} 
          password: ${{ <PASSWORD> }} 

      - name: Build and push
        run: |-
          echo "${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}" | docker login --username "${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}" --password-stdin
          docker buildx create --use
          docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}/multijob-workflow:latest .

      - name: Deploy
        run: |- 
          echo "${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_PASSWORD }}" | docker login --username "${{ secrets.DEPLOYER }}" --password-stdin
          docker pull ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}/multijob-workflow:latest && docker tag ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}/multijob-workflow:latest ${{ secrets.DEPLOYER }}/${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_IMAGE }}:latest && docker push ${{ secrets.DEPLOYER }}/${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_IMAGE }}:latest
